programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Feeling rejected, Laura does not pray for the recovery of her sickly newborn brother.

programme.title: The Convenient Groom
programme.desc: When a celebrity marriage counselor (Vanessa Marcil) is left high and dry at the altar, her contractor steps in as the groom to help her save face.

programme.title: All Summer Long
programme.desc: Tia's dream job of captaining a dining cruise hits rough water when her ex is hired as the restaurant's chef.

programme.title: The Russell Girl
programme.desc: A woman (Amber Tamblyn) tries to make amends with a neighbor (Jennifer Ehle) who lives across the street from her family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Ultimate Gift
programme.desc: Jason Stevens (Drew Fuller) lives a life of wealth and privilege. When his grandfather (James Garner) dies, Jason expects to receive a hefty inheritance. Instead, however, Jason must set out on a journey of self-discovery to earn the true gift his grandfather meant for him to have. Along the way, Jason befriends a dying girl (Abigail Breslin) and her mother (Ali Hillis) and learns what is really important in life.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Ultimate Life
programme.desc: Despite his best intentions, a billionaire has trouble making his beloved girlfriend a priority. He reads his grandfather's journal in the hope that it will provide guidance on how to live his life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Ultimate Legacy
programme.desc: Jason Stevens continues his journey while helping a friend walk a similar path.

programme.title: Love at First Dance
programme.desc: Hope is tasked with teaching Manhattan's former most eligible bachelor how to dance for his extravagant wedding. As the dance lessons progress, complications ensue when feelings begin to develop between the student and the instructor.

programme.desc: Amy is upset with Ty when he purchases a vintage motorcycle; Caleb leaves for a rodeo in Montana.

programme.desc: Rosemary and Lee's baby brings up memories of Rosemary's own mother and questions about her past. Meanwhile, the kids feel left out of the hot springs with all the tourists.
